title: v0.5.0-alpha — First Multiplayer Test
body: Directional melee combat, PK gold loot, dead body visuals, vendor fixes, bank partial withdrawal, and the new auto-updating launcher. Thanks to everyone who helped test!

title: Launcher Released
body: The Era Online launcher is now live. Future updates will download and install automatically — no manual downloads needed.

title: Project Underway
body: Era Online is a faithful Godot 4 port of the original 1999 VB6 MMORPG. Alpha testing is open — register an account in the launcher and jump in.
